rows.Subject: Cannot log into my account
rows.Description: I've tried resetting my password three times but I am still not getting the email link. Please help.

rows.Subject: Where is my refund?
rows.Description: You promised a refund 5 days ago and it is still not in my bank. This is unacceptable.

rows.Subject: Do you offer enterprise pricing for 500+ users?
rows.Description: We are a large agency and want to know if you offer volume discounts.

rows.Subject: App crashes on startup
rows.Description: Ever since the new update on iOS 17 the app crashes immediately when I open it.

rows.Subject: Double charged on my credit card
rows.Description: I just checked my statement and I was charged twice for the monthly subscription.

rows.Subject: Can we get a demo?
rows.Description: Our team is interested in your product but we would like a live demonstration first.

rows.Subject: API rate limit error 429
rows.Description: My integration keeps hitting a 429 Too Many Requests error even though I haven't exceeded my quota.

rows.Subject: Invoice for tax purposes
rows.Description: I need a formal invoice for last month's payment to submit to my accounting department.

rows.Subject: Custom SLA agreement
rows.Description: Do you provide custom Service Level Agreements for your enterprise tier?

rows.Subject: Data sync is failing
rows.Description: The changes I make on the desktop app don't show up on my mobile device.

rows.Subject: Cancel my subscription
rows.Description: I'm not using the service enough to justify the cost. Please cancel my account.

rows.Subject: Partnership opportunity
rows.Description: We would like to discuss a potential integration partnership with your platform.

rows.Subject: Feature request: Dark mode
rows.Description: It hurts my eyes to use the app at night. Please add a dark theme.

rows.Subject: My card was declined
rows.Description: I'm trying to upgrade my plan but my payment keeps failing even though I have funds.

rows.Subject: Do you sell white-label solutions?
rows.Description: We want to resell your software under our own brand.

rows.Subject: Browser extension not working
rows.Description: The Chrome extension doesn't load when I click it on certain websites.

rows.Subject: Prorated refund for annual plan
rows.Description: If I cancel 3 months into an annual plan do I get the rest of my money back?

rows.Subject: Competitor comparison
rows.Description: How does your tool compare to [Competitor Name]? We are deciding between both.

rows.Subject: Lost two days of work
rows.Description: The auto-save feature failed and everything I did yesterday is gone. Is there a backup?

rows.Subject: Disputing a charge
rows.Description: I didn't authorize this recent purchase. I will issue a chargeback if this isn't resolved.
